title: Trump Won't Sign Housing Bill With CBDC Ban—Will It Become Law Tonight Anyway?
summary: Unless President Trump vetoes the bill, it will become law at midnight, banning the Federal Reserve from developing a CBDC until 2031.

title: Circle Stock Jumps as Stablecoin Issuer Wins Final Federal Banking Charter Approval
summary: Circle secured final OCC approval to establish a national trust bank, shifting its $73.2 billion stablecoin to a unified federal framework.
